title: metastelma hookerianum
intro: Metastelma hookerianum, also known as Hooker's climbing milkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Metastelma hookerianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
